task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: Light area 90 cm after the leading edge

section.title: Collect

li.p: Only visible at 90 cm after the leading edge
Area is visible over the complete width of the image
The width of the area is several centimeters
Location is independent of print mode or print speed

section.p: The media step performance show a spike in the Left and/or right side after 90 cm of the leading edge. This spike only happens once in a print and only if the print is printed starting from the leading edge.

section.title: Analyze/Repair
section.p: In case weak media is used, use the tension bar (tight winding) to pull the media through the engine.

section.title: Evaluate/Prevention
section.p: Use the winder mode which is determined in the media profile. These profiles can be downloaded from: https://graphiplaza.cpp.canon/media/.

section.title: Background info
section.p: This artefact will appear if the winding mode is not suitable for the used media.

When the media is taped to the winder and the tension bar is placed, there is an additional force on the media. If the media is too weak this will lead to a displacement of the media which results in a lighter area on the print. The distance between the winder and the location of the printheads is 90 cm.

When winding mode is selected in combination with the tension bar the media will be transported to the winder before the print is started. In this case the tension bar is placed before the print is started. If the wrong winder setting is selected the print has already started when the tension bar is placed. This will lead to a lighter area.
More information about the usage of winding modes can be found in 19 Explanation Winding modes and when to use.
